hero.title:
Your doctor,
at your door.
hero.subtitle: Verified doctors at your hotel, villa or home in 30 minutes. Pay by card, no insurance needed.
hero.trust1: No credit card to sign up

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Your hotel, villa or address. We detect your location or you type it.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Immediate (30 min) or scheduled. Tell us why you need a doctor.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Track on the map as they approach. Pay by card when done.

services.title: Medical services at your door
services.subtitle: From general medicine to emergencies — all available at your hotel, villa or home.

forDoctors.title: Are you a healthcare professional?
forDoctors.subtitle: Join the OnCall Clinic network. Work when you want, get paid instantly.
forDoctors.benefit1Desc: Stripe transfers 85% of each consultation automatically.
forDoctors.benefit2Desc: No mandatory shifts. Toggle availability from the app.

features.title: Everything you need
features.urgentDesc: Request an urgent medical visit and a doctor will arrive at your door in 30-60 min
features.scheduledDesc: Book your visit in advance. Choose the doctor, day and time that suits you best
features.trackingDesc: Follow your doctor on the map and see when they arrive, just like a taxi

terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Use
terms.s1p1: OnCall Clinic (hereinafter, the "Platform") is operated by Ibiza Care SL (CIF: B19973569, registered office in Ibiza, Balearic Islands) and constitutes a digital marketplace connecting patients with licensed healthcare professionals for the provision of home medical services on the island of Ibiza.
terms.s1p2: Access to and use of the Platform implies full acceptance of these Terms and Conditions in accordance with Spanish Law 34/2002 on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE).
terms.s2p1: Ibiza Care SL acts exclusively as a technology intermediary pursuant to Article 1544 of the Spanish Civil Code. It does NOT provide medical or healthcare services of any kind. The care relationship is established directly between the patient and the healthcare professional.
terms.s2p2: Doctors operating through the Platform are self-employed professionals, registered with the Official College of Physicians of the Balearic Islands (COMIB), holding valid professional liability insurance and registered with RETA (Spanish self-employment regime).
terms.s3p1: To use the Platform, users must:
terms.s3li1: Be at least 18 years of age or have legal guardian authorisation
terms.s3li3: Have a valid payment method (credit/debit card)
terms.s3li4: Accept the privacy policy and provide the required consents
terms.s4p1: The patient requests a consultation by indicating their location, type of service and symptoms. The Platform searches for an available doctor and, once accepted, the patient receives confirmation with the professional's details and real-time tracking. Acceptance by the doctor constitutes a binding commitment to attend the specified address.
terms.s5p1: Payments are processed through Stripe Connect. The total price is charged to the patient upon completion of the consultation. Of the total amount, 85% is transferred to the doctor and 15% corresponds to the Platform's intermediation commission.
terms.s5p2: Prices are displayed in euros (€), VAT included where applicable, in accordance with Royal Legislative Decree 1/2007 (LGDCU). The patient will receive a payment receipt by email.
terms.s6p1: Cancellations are governed by the following timeframes:
terms.s6li3: Less than 2 hours before: no refund (0%)
terms.s7p1: Each doctor assumes full clinical responsibility for the care provided and must hold professional liability insurance with minimum coverage of €1,000,000. Ibiza Care SL, as an intermediary, assumes no responsibility for the quality, suitability or outcome of medical acts performed.
terms.s7p2: Ibiza Care SL shall not be liable for damages arising from service interruptions, technical failures or force majeure, in accordance with Balearic Islands Consumer Protection Law 7/2014.
terms.s8p1: The processing of personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy, accessible from this legal section, in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018 (LOPDGDD).
terms.s9p1: All Platform content (code, design, text, logos, trademarks) is the property of Ibiza Care SL or its licensors and is protected by applicable intellectual and industrial property legislation. Reproduction without express authorisation is prohibited.
terms.s10p1: These Terms are governed by Spanish law. For any dispute arising from the use of the Platform, the parties submit to the Courts and Tribunals of Ibiza, waiving any other jurisdiction that may apply, except where consumer regulations establish a different jurisdiction.

withdrawal.title: 11. Right of withdrawal
withdrawal.content: Pursuant to Article 103(a) of Royal Legislative Decree 1/2007 (LGDCU), the right of withdrawal does not apply to healthcare services once execution has begun with the consumer's express consent. For cancellations before service commencement, the current cancellation policy applies (100% refund if cancelled more than 24h in advance; 50% between 2-24h; no refund if cancelled less than 2h before).

odr.title: 12. Online Dispute Resolution (ODR) and complaint forms
odr.content: Pursuant to EU Regulation 524/2013, you may submit complaints through the European Commission's ODR platform at

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This cookie policy explains which cookies are used by the OnCall Clinic Platform, operated by Ibiza Care SL, in accordance with Article 22.2 of Spanish Law 34/2002 (LSSI-CE) and Articles 6 and 7 of Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR).
cookies.whatDesc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They allow us to remember your preferences, keep your session active and analyse how the service is used.
cookies.noMarketing: We do not use marketing or advertising cookies in the current version of the Platform.
cookies.manageDesc: You can accept or reject optional cookies from the banner that appears on your first visit. You can also change your cookie settings at any time from your browser settings. Please note that disabling technical cookies may affect the functionality of the service.
cookies.legalDesc: Technical cookies are installed on the basis of the controller's legitimate interest (Art. 6.1.f GDPR) as they are necessary for the Platform to function. Analytics cookies are only activated with your prior consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR), in accordance with Art. 22.2 LSSI-CE.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s2Title: 2. Purposes and legal basis for processing
privacy.purpose1Desc: Create and maintain your account, authentication, service communications.
privacy.purpose1Legal: Legal basis: Performance of a contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR)
privacy.purpose2Desc: Connect you with available doctors, manage bookings, real-time GPS tracking.
privacy.purpose2Legal: Legal basis: Performance of a contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR)
privacy.purpose3Desc: Charges, refunds and transfers to doctors via Stripe Connect.
privacy.purpose3Legal: Legal basis: Performance of a contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) + Legal tax obligation (Art. 6.1.c GDPR)
privacy.purpose4Legal: Legal basis: Consent of the data subject (Art. 6.1.a GDPR)
privacy.purpose5Desc: Anonymous usage statistics, error detection, experience optimisation.
privacy.purpose6Desc: Management of symptoms, consultation history and doctor-patient communication. This data is processed exclusively for the provision of the requested medical service.
privacy.purpose6Legal: Legal basis: Explicit consent of the data subject (Art. 9.2.a GDPR)
privacy.s4Intro: In accordance with Articles 15 to 22 of the GDPR, you have the right to:
privacy.s4Contact: To exercise your rights, contact our DPO: teiguell.med@gmail.com
privacy.s4Aepd: You also have the right to file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD): www.aepd.es
privacy.retention1: Clinical data: 5 years from the last consultation (Law 41/2002 on Patient Autonomy)
privacy.retention2: Account data: 3 years after account closure
privacy.retention3: Payment and billing data: 5 years (tax obligation)
privacy.s6Content: We use Stripe Inc. (USA) as our payment processor, protected under the European Commission's Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs, Art. 46 GDPR) and the EU-US Data Privacy Framework. No other international transfers of personal data are made.

dpia.title: 7. Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA)
dpia.content: In accordance with Article 35 of the GDPR, OnCall Clinic has conducted a Data Protection Impact Assessment for the large-scale processing of health data. This assessment is kept updated and available to the Spanish Data Protection Authority (AEPD) upon reasoned request.

privacy.managePrefs: Manage your privacy preferences from your panel:

avisoLegal.title: Legal Notice
avisoLegal.s1p1: In compliance with the disclosure duty of article 10 of Law 34/2002 of 11 July on Information Society and Electronic Commerce Services (LSSI-CE), we provide the following information:
avisoLegal.s2p1: OnCall Clinic is an intermediary platform between patients and licensed healthcare professionals. We do not provide medical services directly; we facilitate the contractual engagement between parties, manage payments and provide communication and tracking tools.
avisoLegal.s3p1: Access and use of the website implies acceptance of the general terms of use published in the Terms & Conditions section. Users commit to a diligent use of the platform and to refraining from any activity contrary to law, morals or public order.
avisoLegal.s4p1: All content on the website (text, images, trademarks, logos, source code, databases and design) is the property of Ibiza Care SL or its licensors, protected under Spanish and international intellectual and industrial property law.
avisoLegal.s5p1: These terms are governed by Spanish law. Any dispute arising from the use of the website shall be submitted to the Courts and Tribunals of Eivissa (Balearic Islands), with express waiver of any other forum that may correspond to the parties.
